response: everyday people with learning disabilities can excel in academic areas by using the right support and resources. they can achieve success in school and beyond by accessing appropriate education and assistance. it is important to recognize that learning disabilities do not limit a person's potential. with the right environment and support, individuals with learning disabilities can thrive in academic settings. it is a misconception to believe that people with learning disabilities cannot excel in academic areas. they have the same potential as others and can achieve success with the right support and encouragement.
